repoPolicy: Execute work in phased waves. Never start a phase until all dependencies are REVIEW_PASSED or MERGED. After each phase, pause for validation and commit/push before continuing.

phases.title: Monorepo/workspace + base extension scaffold + tooling
phases.scope: Initialize the public monorepo/workspace, base extension scaffold, and shared development tooling conventions.
checklist: Add apps/extension Chrome Extension MV3 + TypeScript scaffold
Add shared linting, formatting, and TypeScript config

phases.title: Shared contracts package
phases.scope: Define and export shared DTOs/contracts/schemas used across snapshot, planner, validator, compiler, runtime, and messaging boundaries.
checklist: Add shared DTOs for page snapshots, actions, sections, metrics
Add settings and message payload contracts
Add validation schemas for all top-level serialized objects
Export contracts for all public packages
acceptanceCriteria: Shared DTOs and enhancement/runtime/message contracts are defined
Validation schemas exist for top-level serialized objects
Contracts are exported for all public packages
Other tracks can depend on shared contracts without drift

phases.title: MV3 manifest + service worker + content script wiring
phases.scope: Build extension shell bootstrapping with MV3 manifest, background worker, content script, and foundational message routing.
checklist: Add message routing between content script and service worker
Add site hostname detection and page eligibility checks
acceptanceCriteria: Content script runs on target pages

phases.title: Popup shell + options shell + settings plumbing
phases.scope: Create popup/options shell UIs and connect settings read/write through the extension service worker.
checklist: Add shared settings read/write flow through service worker
Show current page enhancement summary placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: Site toggle and mode selector are wired
Settings read/write flow works through service worker

phases.title: Snapshot core extraction
phases.scope: Implement normalized DOM snapshot extraction for metadata, actions, sections, and metrics suitable for planner input.
checklist: Ignore hidden elements and user-entered values
Cap large element sets for planner safety
acceptanceCriteria: Snapshot returns expected metadata on sample pages
Snapshot payload stays within expected size

phases.title: Heuristics + selector hardening
phases.scope: Improve snapshot quality with page-type heuristics, stable selectors, deduplication, fixture tests, and debug visibility.
checklist: Add debug logging for snapshot output
acceptanceCriteria: Page-type heuristics and selector hardening are implemented

phases.title: Planner interface + adapter contract
phases.scope: Define public planner abstractions, deterministic mock planner, parsing, capabilities, and planner error contract.
checklist: Add mock planner returning deterministic plans
acceptanceCriteria: Planner adapter handles success and failure
Invalid planner output is surfaced cleanly

phases.title: Planner execution flow inside content script
phases.scope: Integrate planner calls into content pipeline with timeout/retry, summary logging, and concurrency guards.
checklist: Call planner adapter from content pipeline
Add plan summary logging for popup
Guard against duplicate concurrent planner runs
acceptanceCriteria: Planner input is built from snapshots in content flow
Planner adapter is invoked from pipeline
Duplicate concurrent planner runs are prevented

phases.title: Schema + token validation
phases.scope: Validate planner outputs against schema, supported types, required fields, numeric token bounds, and count limits.
checklist: Validate required fields per enhancement type
Validate max counts (toolbar actions, jump links)
acceptanceCriteria: Out-of-range tokens are rejected or clamped

phases.title: Selector + safety validation
phases.scope: Add runtime-aware selector and behavior safety checks to produce a SafeEnhancementPlan.
acceptanceCriteria: Selectors are validated against current DOM

phases.title: Runtime op contracts + compiler core
phases.scope: Define runtime operation model and compile supported enhancement types into deterministic runtime ops.
acceptanceCriteria: Safe plan compiles to deterministic op list
Runtime ops are stable across repeated runs
Each supported enhancement type is compiled

phases.title: Cleanup model + op execution planning
phases.scope: Add execution planning semantics for cleanup, batching, rerun/replace lifecycle, and cleanup-sensitive compiler tests.
checklist: Add re-run/replace semantics for SPA navigation
Add compiler tests for cleanup-sensitive scenarios
acceptanceCriteria: Cleanup registration and execution handle contracts are defined
Op batching and rerun/replace semantics are implemented

phases.title: Overlay root + toolbar + jump links
phases.scope: Implement assistive overlay runtime with mount root, toolbar/jump link execution, and robust cleanup behavior.
checklist: Add safe event binding for focus/scroll/click actions
Add cleanup support for inserted nodes and listeners
Ensure duplicate runs replace prior overlay cleanly
acceptanceCriteria: Jump links scroll to correct sections

phases.title: Theme patch + style patch runtime
phases.scope: Implement reversible theme/style patch execution with token normalization, semantic resolvers, and runtime clamping.
checklist: Apply classes/style tags in reversible way
acceptanceCriteria: Theme and style patch executors are implemented
Token-to-CSS compilation and semantic resolvers are in place
Runtime-applied tokens are clamped and normalized

phases.title: Settings model + persistence
phases.scope: Implement global/per-site settings persistence and lookup behavior using chrome.storage.local.
checklist: Add mode resolution (global default + site override)
acceptanceCriteria: Plan summary is readable after page run

phases.title: Dismissals + execution memory
phases.scope: Persist dismissals, execution signatures, debug mode, and expose relevant stored state to UI surfaces.
checklist: Add recent execution hash or plan signature
Surface stored values to popup/options UI
acceptanceCriteria: Dismissed enhancements and execution signatures are stored
Repeat application loops are reduced via execution memory
Stored values are accessible to popup/options UI

phases.title: Popup product UI
phases.scope: Build MVP popup controls for site status, mode, plan summary, rerun/remove actions, and planner status.

phases.title: Options page + developer controls
phases.scope: Extend options UI with global defaults, debug/developer controls, planner selection, site overrides, and reset flow.
checklist: Add planner/mock planner selection for local dev
Add list of stored site overrides
acceptanceCriteria: Options UI supports global defaults and debug mode

phases.title: Rerun lifecycle + debounce
phases.scope: Implement stable rerun lifecycle for SPA navigation with route observation, debounce, and cleanup-before-reapply behavior.
checklist: Avoid planner double-execution on initial page load
acceptanceCriteria: Previous UI is cleaned up before reapply
Static pages are not reprocessed excessively

phases.title: Stability hardening + fallback handling
phases.scope: Harden lifecycle behavior with timeout handling, DOM signature checks, partial-failure recovery, and no-op safety paths.
checklist: Skip rerun when DOM signature has not materially changed
Add safe no-op path when page becomes ineligible
acceptanceCriteria: DOM signature checks prevent unnecessary reruns
Lifecycle debug logs and ineligible-page no-op path are implemented

phases.title: Unit tests for contracts, validator, compiler
phases.scope: Add deterministic fixture-based unit tests for contracts, validator behavior, compiler stability, and token/selector bounds.
checklist: Add contract tests for shared types/schemas
Add selector validation tests with synthetic DOM fixtures

phases.title: Manual QA fixtures + demo pages
phases.scope: Add representative saved fixtures and manual QA checklists for legacy/classified, docs/article, and admin/table-heavy page archetypes.
checklist: Add saved HTML/DOM fixtures for ugly legacy pages
Add manual QA checklist per fixture
acceptanceCriteria: Saved fixture set exists for targeted page archetypes
Fixture test cases cover classified, docs/article, and admin/table-heavy pages
Manual QA checklist exists per fixture

phases.title: Community build + docs
phases.scope: Prepare public community build/release pipeline and core open-source documentation for setup, architecture, contracts, and contribution.
checklist: Add README setup and architecture links
Add example mock planner demo instructions
acceptanceCriteria: Fresh clone setup works from docs
Community demo works without private access
Public docs match current code layout

phases.title: Chrome Web Store prep + maintenance scripts
phases.scope: Finalize release operations with versioning/changelog/store-prep assets, maintenance scripts, and issue templates.
checklist: Add issue templates for bug reports and enhancement requests
acceptanceCriteria: Maintenance scripts and issue templates are in place
